evals.prompt: Review this skill description: 'Use this when doing TDD, test-first development, red-green-refactor, writing tests before code, and building features with tests.' Make it better.
evals.expected_output: The agent collapses duplicate trigger branches into concise model-facing trigger language and preserves only distinct invocation reasons.
assertions: Front-loads a strong leading word when useful.
Avoids restating body identity in the description.

evals.prompt: This SKILL.md has three pages of examples used only by one branch. Should I keep them inline?
evals.expected_output: The agent recommends moving branch-specific examples into a linked reference file with a clear context pointer while keeping core steps inline.
assertions: Uses the information hierarchy to decide what stays in SKILL.md.
Applies progressive disclosure for branch-specific reference material.
Keeps related concept definitions and caveats co-located.
Preserves the skill's intent while reducing sprawl.
